journal_entry.description: Board resolution - no financial impact (memo entry)
journal_entry.rationale: Both debit and credit tuples are (0,0,0,0,0,0), indicating this is an administrative event with no accounting impact. Board resolutions that do not involve financial transactions (e.g., approval of policies, appointment of officers, strategic decisions) are documented in corporate minutes but do not require journal entries. Under IFRS, only events that affect the financial position or performance of the entity are recorded. This transaction has no economic substance to record.

output.reason: Board resolution with no financial impact = no journal entry required. No debit lines exist, so all counts are zero.
